actions.name: balanced
actions.instruction: Recommend the approved balanced tunnel profile.

actions.name: low-latency
actions.instruction: Recommend the approved low-latency tunnel profile.

actions.name: high-privacy
actions.instruction: Recommend the approved high-privacy tunnel profile.

actions.name: rotate-endpoint
actions.instruction: Recommend rotating to the next approved endpoint.

actions.name: pause-and-review
actions.instruction: Recommend pausing automation and requesting human review.

low-latency.purpose: Lower-latency policy for approved interactive traffic.

high-privacy.purpose: Higher-privacy policy using an approved endpoint.

rotate-endpoint.purpose: Rotate within a separately maintained approved endpoint list.

pause-and-review.purpose: Do not connect. Ask for human review.

cryptography_requirements.key_establishment: Use a vetted VPN implementation that supports NIST FIPS 203 ML-KEM or a reviewed hybrid key-establishment mode.
cryptography_requirements.authentication: Use a vetted authentication design and migrate signatures according to vendor guidance, including NIST FIPS 204 ML-DSA where appropriate.
cryptography_requirements.data_plane: Use the VPN implementation's reviewed authenticated-encryption data plane. Do not invent a cipher.
